purpose: Soft ambient loop for the Safe Space screen — a calm quiet room Gefen can retreat to
purpose_he: רקע שקט למסך ה'מקום הבטוח' — חדר שקט שגפן יכולה לנוח בו
sensory_rules: no sudden changes in volume or texture
seamless loop — no audible gap or click
must not demand attention — purely background
prompt_for_elevenlabs: A very soft peaceful ambient sound for a Hebrew children's educational app safe space screen, gentle flowing water with very quiet soft bubbles, warm and enveloping like sitting beside a calm shallow stream on a sunny afternoon, soothing and meditative, purely background texture that does not demand attention, smooth seamlessly loopable, no harsh sounds, no sudden changes, 20 seconds.
script_entry: ("safe_space_ambient.mp3", "A very soft peaceful ambient water sound for a Hebrew children's safe space screen, gentle flowing stream with quiet soft bubbles, warm and calming, seamlessly loopable, no sudden changes, 20 seconds.", 20.0)
